Article Title: Why was Karley Swindel cut out of Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders Season 3? DCC fans accuse organization of disrespecting veteran star
Article Text:
Karley Swindel’s reported exit from the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders ahead of Season 3 of Netflix’s America’s Sweethearts sparked massive backlash online. Fans flooded social media with emotional reactions and launched the “Justice for Karley” movement after the veteran cheerleader reposted support messages on Instagram. Conflicting reports about how teammates reacted after the cut added more controversy, while many supporters questioned why one of the squad’s most beloved longtime members was suddenly removed.

Karley Swindel’s Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders exit sparks emotional reaction

America’s Sweethearts spotlight adds more pressure to DCC decision

The Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders community is in full meltdown mode after longtime fan favorite Karley Swindel was reportedly cut from the squad just before what would have been her fifth season. The timing alone stunned supporters. With Netflix’s America’s Sweethearts: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders returning in just days, many expected Swindel to remain one of the veteran faces leading the team into another high-profile year.Instead, social media exploded with disbelief, frustration, and emotional reactions from fans who viewed Swindel as one of the organization’s most recognizable and respected performers. Within hours, hashtags defending her started circulating online, turning a routine roster decision into one of the biggest talking points surrounding the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders this summer.The controversy gained momentum after reports surfaced from fan-run DCC update accounts claiming Swindel had been cut during the audition process. While the cheerleader did not issue a formal statement, she appeared to acknowledge the reports by reposting a video on Instagram Stories featuring the hashtag #JusticeForKarley.That single repost was enough to send fans into overdrive.Supporters quickly flooded comment sections with emotional tributes, arguing that Swindel represented the heart of the squad. Many pointed to her consistency, leadership, and popularity among viewers of Netflix’s documentary series.One viral post shared by the @dcc_updates account included claims about the emotional aftermath of the announcement. The account alleged:"Veterans were reportedly not allowed to got to Karley in the stands after the announcements. They had to stay on the field and were told to pull it together for photos."The statement fueled even more outrage online before another update complicated the narrative. According to screenshots later shared by the same account, current DCC member Marissa Lescheber disputed the claim in a direct message, saying:"This is not true! Many of us immediately went to be with Karley and our staff members were very respectful and understanding of the gravity of the situation while still trying to show support for the new rookie candidates."Even with that clarification, fan frustration never slowed down. Instead, the debate shifted toward whether the organization had made the right decision at all.The timing of Swindel’s reported departure has amplified attention because the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders organization is currently under a brighter spotlight than ever before. Netflix’s America’s Sweethearts has turned auditions, cuts, and behind-the-scenes emotions into must-watch television, bringing new scrutiny to how the team operates.Fans rallied around Swindel in large numbers after posts honoring her started gaining traction online. Former DCC member Marissa Garrison wrote:"Justice for an amazing dancer, person, and one of the best the organization has ever had the privilege of having. We love you, Karley."Another supporter added:"My heart is breaking for her! It's absurd what has happened! Karley is a hometown favorite!! And truly one of a kind!! Praying for justice for her!! @karley_swindel 🙏🏻🙏🏻"A third emotional comment read:"I pray for the organization because these girls truly deserve better. Justice for Karley." As the June 16 premiere date for America’s Sweethearts approaches, Swindel’s exit has already become one of the defining stories surrounding the upcoming season. For many fans, the shock is not simply about losing a veteran cheerleader. It is about watching a beloved face disappear from one of the most famous cheerleading squads in sports without warning.
Article Summary: Karley Swindel’s reported exit from the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders sparked massive backlash online. Fans flooded social media with emotional reactions and launched the “Justice for Karley’ movement. Conflicting reports about how teammates reacted after the cut added more controversy.

Article Title: "So disgusting": Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce beach image sparks heated fan war and viral body image debate
Article Text:
An old beach photo of Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce recently resurfaced online, sparking mixed reactions across social media. Fans debated everything from the couple’s same-age relationship to Kelce’s appearance, while others questioned whether the image was AI-generated. Many users defended the pair and criticized unrealistic beauty standards online. The viral discussion quickly turned into a broader conversation about celebrity culture, internet outrage and the constant scrutiny surrounding Swift and Kelce’s high-profile relationship.

Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce fan reactions split social media

Travis Kelce and Taylor Swift discourse takes another strange turn

A resurfaced beach photo of Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce sparked a fresh round of online reactions this week, with social media users debating everything from body image to age-gap discourse. The image itself is not recent, despite many users online treating it like a new paparazzi moment. Still, that did not stop thousands of comments from flooding X as fans and critics picked apart the couple’s appearance and relationship dynamic.The old vacation image quickly went viral after one user joked about Swift and Kelce being the same age. What followed was a chaotic mix of sarcasm, memes, criticism and support, showing once again how even an older photo involving Swift and Kelce can dominate timelines within hours.The original viral post read:“Travis Kelce and Taylor Swift are both 36something so disgusting about a relationship with no age gap whatsoevershe’s old enough to be his sister”The absurdity of the joke confused some users and entertained others. Many responses mocked the internet’s endless obsession with celebrity relationships and age differences.One user wrote:“Holy fuck.There's something disgusting with SMALL age gaps There's something disgusting with BIG age gaps There's something disgusting with NO age gapsThis has either got to be some god-tier ragebait or people like you got no love as a child.”Others focused less on the joke and more on the photo itself. Several comments questioned whether the image was edited or AI-generated, while others criticized Kelce’s appearance despite his status as one of the NFL’s biggest stars.“Sometimes I’m hard on myself on what my body looks like but bro if a pro nfl player looks like that I’m good, the internet really fucked up our perception of what is the norm,” one fan posted.Another added:“Ew I thought football players were supposed to be hot and muscular This mf sporting the least athletic looking body for an athlete ever”The reactions quickly turned into a wider conversation about unrealistic beauty standards, especially around athletes and celebrities constantly photographed in public.The thread also revealed how divided online audiences remain whenever Swift and Kelce trend together. Some comments were openly supportive, while others drifted into criticism about Swift’s age and future family plans.One user defended the singer by writing:“This is why I like older women...At least she’s had time to live her life, make a family and have a career she’s proud of.Too many selfish assholes out here...”Meanwhile, another fan questioned the authenticity of the image itself:“Is this a fake photo or AI? It looks off”A separate comment read:“I don't know if this is real or AI but is he really that hairy? 🤮”Despite the mixed tone, the viral reaction highlighted something familiar about internet culture around Swift and Kelce. Even an older beach photo can suddenly become a trending topic, pulling in debates about relationships, body image, celebrity expectations and social media outrage all at once.That may be why the discussion spread so quickly. The photo was old, but the internet’s fascination with Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce clearly is not.
Article Summary: An old beach photo of Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce recently resurfaced online, sparking mixed reactions across social media. Fans debated everything from the couple’s same-age relationship to Kelce's appearance, while others questioned whether the image was AI-generated.

Article Title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce were supposed to get married yesterday, June 13th — so what do we actually know about their wedding?
Article Text:
Image X

Why did everyone think Taylor Swift was getting married yesterday? The full timeline of the June 13 rumour



Then the wedding planner stepped in

"I am the wedding planner for June 13th at the Ocean House in Rhode Island,"

"Sorry to let you all know, Taylor is not my bride this weekend! Boo!"

So when is the wedding actually happening?



"Your English teacher and your gym teacher are getting married."

"Anyone I've ever talked to,"

The internet spent six months convinced it knew exactly when Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce were getting married. June 13, 2026. A Saturday. The only Saturday falling on the 13th all year. Taylor's lucky number, near her Rhode Island mansion, at a five-star resort steps from her front door. It was perfect. It was poetic. It was very, very Taylor.It was also wrong. Yesterday, June 13, Taylor and Travis were spotted on a date night in New York City, watching the Broadway comedy Oh, Mary! at the Lyceum Theatre. They posed backstage with the cast, held hands in the West Village, and wore matching red outfits. No vows. No venue. No wedding.The whole thing began in December 2025, when Page Six reported that Swift had paid another bride to give up her June 13 booking at Ocean House, a luxury resort in Watch Hill, Rhode Island, a stone's throw from Swift's own $18 million oceanfront mansion. According to the outlet, the mystery bride was offered full coverage of her wedding costs, rescheduling fees, and honeymoon in exchange for the date. Swift allegedly wanted it that badly.The logic was bulletproof by Swiftie standards. Thirteen is Taylor's famous lucky number; she was born on December 13, and she has tattooed it across her entire public persona for over a decade. June 13 was the only Saturday falling on the 13th in 2026.The venue was within walking distance from her house. Fans were convinced. The media ran with it. For months, it was treated as a confirmed fact.In April, luxury event planner Tara Guérard posted a comment on Instagram that ended the speculation bluntly.she wrote.The venue's own Director of Sales and Marketing separately told TMZ that Ocean House would never allow one couple to buy out another's wedding date. The rumour was dead. The internet did not take it well.Nobody knows for certain, including, it seems, most of the people reporting on it. What is confirmed: Taylor and Travis got engaged in August 2025 and announced it on Instagram with the captionSwift told Graham Norton in October that the wedding would be in 2026 and that she plans to invite essentially everyone she has ever met,she said, adding that she refused to have a guest list small enough to put people "on the bubble."Reports have since pointed to everything from her Rhode Island mansion to a New York City venue to a July 4th weekend ceremony. Save-the-date cards reportedly went out, then reports emerged that those cards may have been decoys to throw off the press. Even the guest list has had multiple versions - Selena Gomez, Brittany Mahomes, Cara Delevingne, Patrick Mahomes, Andy Reid, and reportedly Prince William and Kate Middleton have all been named at various points.What is known: the wedding will happen before Travis reports to Chiefs training camp in late July. That window is narrowing fast. Travis is in Cleveland today, Los Angeles tomorrow for a live episode of New Heights, and Nashville from June 22 for Tight End University. Taylor just received her Songwriters Hall of Fame induction on Thursday. These two are not slowing down. But somewhere in between all of it, the most-watched wedding in the world is still coming. Just not on June 13.
Article Summary: The internet spent six months convinced it knew exactly when Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce were getting married. June 13, 2026. A Saturday. The only Saturday falling on the 13th all year. Taylor's lucky number, near her Rhode Island mansion, at a five-star resort steps from her front door.

Article Title: Why did the Chiefs pay Patrick Mahomes half a billion dollars after his worst season ever?
Article Text:
Patrick Mahomes (Image Via Getty)

Patrick Mahomes signs $504.75M Chiefs deal — the most expensive bet in NFL history explained



Is the injury a risk?



Patrick Mahomes had the worst season of his career. The Chiefs gave him half a billion dollars anyway.Last December, Kansas City's superstar quarterback tore both his ACL and LCL in a loss to the Los Angeles Chargers. It was Week 15. The Chiefs were already eliminated from playoff contention, the first time in the entire Mahomes era that Kansas City missed the postseason. His completion percentage was the lowest of his career. His 22 touchdowns were the fewest of his career. His passer rating was his worst ever. By every statistical measure, 2025 was the ugliest year Patrick Mahomes has had in an NFL uniform.Six months later, the Chiefs handed him $504.75 million.Let's be clear about what the numbers actually say. Yes, 2025 was bad. But context matters. Mahomes was playing hurt for most of the season, behind a depleted roster, carrying an offense that had very little around him. Even in that broken-down state, he threw for over 3,500 yards and set a career high in rushing. The season was bad by Mahomes' standards, which means it was still better than what most NFL quarterbacks produce in their best years.The Chiefs are not paying for 2025. They are paying for what Mahomes has done since 2018 and what they believe he will do through 2033. That includes five Super Bowl appearances, three championships, two MVP awards, and a decade of making Kansas City the most dominant franchise in the NFL. He reached 30 career sacks faster than any quarterback in history. He had never missed the playoffs until this year, when his knee gave out mid-season.The Chiefs added two years to Mahomes' existing contract, bringing the total value to $504.75 million through the 2033 season. To put that in perspective, that is more money than most countries spend on their entire sports budgets in a year. Patrick Mahomes will earn it by throwing a football in Kansas City.That makes it the first contract in NFL history to cross the half-billion-dollar mark. Starting in 2027, when the new money kicks in, Mahomes earns $64 million per year, also a new NFL record. The entire amount eventually becomes fully guaranteed. If he hits performance incentives like Super Bowl wins and MVP awards, he can earn up to $522.25 million total. The Chiefs have now committed $689 million in new money to Mahomes since 2022.This is also the third time in six years they have rewritten what a quarterback contract looks like. In 2017, Mahomes signed a rookie deal worth $16.4 million. He will now earn more than that in a single month.Technically, yes. ACL and LCL tears are serious. Recovery takes nine to twelve months. The Chiefs are targeting Week 1 of the 2026 season for his return, and early reports from minicamp suggest he is ahead of schedule. His teammate Trey Smith said in June that Mahomes has "attacked rehab every single day with everything he's got." Andy Reid called him "so positive." The Chiefs signed backup Justin Fields and brought in Kenneth Walker III to reduce the early-season load on the knee.The gamble is real. But the Chiefs looked at a torn knee, a missed playoff season, and career-worst numbers and decided Patrick Mahomes, injured, is still worth more than any other quarterback healthy.That is either the most confident organizational decision in NFL history. Or the most expensive one. Probably both.
Article Summary: Patrick Mahomes had the worst season of his career in 2025. The Chiefs gave him $504.75 million anyway. It's the first contract in NFL history to cross the half-billion-dollar mark. He will earn more than most countries spend on their entire sports budgets in a year.

Article Title: Aldon Smith’s friend shared details from his final moments and fans think something feels off
Article Text:
Aldon Smith Dead at 36 (Getty Images)

Aldon Smith died at 36, trying to turn his life around - What Aldon Smith did on his last day alive?



Why are fans not buying his friend’s story?



"He was perfectly fine an hour before. I came out, and he was basically dead in my front seat."

Aldon Smith had no business being as good as he was. Seventh pick in the 2011 draft. Fourteen sacks as a rookie, second most in NFL history. Then, 19.5, the very next year, a 49ers franchise record that still stands. He reached 30 career sacks faster than any player in NFL history, breaking a record held by Reggie White. He was 22 years old. He played in a Super Bowl. He was supposed to be generational.He was 36 when he died on Saturday.Smith was found unresponsive in the front passenger seat of his friend Amir Shirazi's white Chevy pickup, outside Shirazi's home in Los Gatos, California. He was declared dead at Good Samaritan Hospital in San Jose at 12:46 p.m. Cause of death is pending investigation by the Santa Clara County medical examiner. He had no idea that morning would be his last.A few hours before he died, Smith and Shirazi had been out making a pizza run, not for themselves. The pair delivered ten Little Caesars pizzas to Scott Wagers, co-founder of CHAM Deliverance Ministry, a local charity that feeds the homeless.Wagers had never met Smith. He had no idea the former NFL star was coming.Smith showed up in a Willis Reed throwback jersey, blue shorts, and Air Jordans, took a few photos, unloaded the pizzas, and left. Wagers told the San Francisco Chronicle that Smith seemed maybe a little tired, but he was warm, present, giving.After the delivery, Shirazi drove them to a grocery store and a gas station. They were joking, talking, just hanging out. Then Shirazi stepped inside his house to turn on some lights. He came back out and found Smith slumped over in the passenger seat, mouth open, his massive frame slightly twitching. Shirazi called 911 and reached former 49ers running back Anthony Dixon to help him perform CPR. Less than an hour later, Smith was gone.Within hours of the news breaking, X was doing what X does. Fans began picking apart the details of Shirazi's account - the timeline, the reason for going inside to turn on lights, the decision to call Anthony Dixon before or alongside 911. One widely shared observation was that a photo from the charity visit appeared to show nine pizza boxes, not the ten Shirazi mentioned. Others questioned Shirazi's character outright, with some accounts calling him untrustworthy and an addict.The numbers Smith put up in his first two NFL seasons, 33.5 sacks, which remain the most by any player in their first two years in league history. But the rest of his career is a chronicle of what was lost. Multiple DUI arrests. A voluntary stint in rehab in 2013. A nine-game suspension in 2014. Released by the 49ers in 2015 after his third DUI. Suspended again after signing with the Raiders. Four years out of the NFL entirely.He came back in 2020 with the Cowboys with 16 starts, 5 sacks, and a full season. Then an arrest derailed a Seahawks stint before it could begin, and that was it. He finished with 52.5 career sacks across 75 games. Given even a fraction of the time that should have been his, that number could have been historic in a completely different way. The 49ers released a statement Saturday calling his passing "sudden and tragic" and remembering him for his "infectious smile that lit up every room. " Shirazi said it simply:
Article Summary: Aldon Smith was found unresponsive in the front passenger seat of his friend Amir Shirazi's white Chevy pickup. He was declared dead at Good Samaritan Hospital in San Jose at 12:46 p.m. Cause of death is pending investigation. A few hours before he died, Smith and Shirazi had been out making a pizza run, not for themselves.

Article Title: NFL trade rumors: New England Patriots linked to $10 Million New York Giants pass rusher in surprise move
Article Text:
The New England Patriots are being linked to New York Giants edge rusher Kayvon Thibodeaux in a proposed offseason trade. Bleacher Report suggested the Patriots could offer a conditional 2027 third-round pick for the former top-five draft pick. After acquiring A.J. Brown, New England may continue rebuilding aggressively under Mike Vrabel. Thibodeaux remains an intriguing option despite an injury-affected 2025 season, as the Patriots still need more pass-rush production heading into the 2026 campaign.

Which teams are interested in Kayvon Thibodeaux?

What insiders are saying about the trade rumors

Contract details and salary cap implications

How the trade could impact both teams

The New England Patriots may not be done making aggressive moves this offseason. Just days after pulling off a blockbuster trade for wide receiver A.J. Brown, the Patriots are now being linked to New York Giants edge rusher Kayvon Thibodeaux.A proposed deal from Bleacher Report suggests New England could send a conditional 2027 third-round pick to the Giants in exchange for the former No. 5 overall pick, adding another major piece to Mike Vrabel’s roster rebuild.The Patriots have emerged as one of the more interesting teams connected to Thibodeaux as speculation around the Giants defender continues to grow. New England entered the offseason with two major priorities: upgrading the offense and improving its pass rush.The first need was addressed through the addition of A.J. Brown and free-agent receiver Romeo Doubs. The second remains unfinished.Even after signing Dre’Mont Jones and drafting Gabe Jacas, the Patriots still lack a proven edge threat capable of changing games consistently. That is where Thibodeaux becomes intriguing. Despite an uneven 2025 season shortened by injury, he is still only 25 years old and has already produced an 11.5-sack campaign during his NFL career.Other teams needing pass-rush help are likely monitoring the situation as well, but the Patriots stand out because of their aggressive offseason approach under Vrabel.Bleacher Report’s Gary Davenport believes New England could continue pushing for immediate contention after already sacrificing draft capital in the Brown trade.“The New York Giants have maintained throughout the offseason that they have no intention of trading contract-year edge-rusher Kayvon Thibodeaux—at least not for what teams have offered to date,” wrote Davenport.“Of course, if the Giants can get a better deal than the compensatory pick the team will get when Thibodeaux all but certainly leaves in 2027 in free agency, it could be another story. The Patriots have already pushed their chips into the middle of the table with the A.J. Brown trade.“For the opportunity to bolster the pass rush, New England might as well mortgage the future a little bit more. And while Thibodeaux had a down 2025, we are taking about a 25-year-old former top-five pick with an 11.5-sack season on his NFL resume.”That last point matters. Around the league, executives still view Thibodeaux as a player with untapped upside rather than a finished product.One reason Thibodeaux remains attractive in trade discussions is his manageable contract. Since he is still playing under his rookie deal, acquiring him would not immediately create major cap stress for New England.There are also no known trade restrictions tied to his contract. The bigger issue for the Patriots would be future value. Trading for a player entering the final stretch of his rookie deal usually comes with extension questions shortly afterward.For the Giants, moving Thibodeaux could prevent the risk of losing him later for only a compensatory draft selection if negotiations do not progress.For New England, adding Thibodeaux would further signal that the organization believes it can compete right away under Vrabel. The defense already showed flashes last season, but the pass rush lacked consistency throughout key stretches.Pairing Thibodeaux with the Patriots’ current defensive front could create the type of pressure unit the team has been missing for years.The Giants would face a tougher conversation. Trading a former top-five selection is never simple, especially when the player is still young enough to develop further. Still, if the franchise doubts a long-term extension is realistic, maximizing trade value now may become the smarter route.At this stage, league sources still expect the Giants to hold firm publicly. But as training camp gets closer, the volume around Thibodeaux trade speculation continues to rise.
Article Summary: The New England Patriots are being linked to New York Giants edge rusher Kayvon Thibodeaux. Bleacher Report suggested the Patriots could offer a conditional 2027 third-round pick for the former top-five draft pick. After acquiring A.J. Brown, New England may continue rebuilding aggressively under Mike Vrabel.

NFL insiders believe San Francisco wants to strengthen its pass rush after struggling defensively last season. While stars like Maxx Crosby seem financially unrealistic, Thibodeaux’s rookie contract makes him a more manageable option. How the trade could impact both teams

Rumors surrounding the San Francisco 49ers are heating up again, with league insiders expecting the franchise to aggressively explore the edge rusher market before training camp opens next month. While no financial framework has surfaced yet, executives around the league believe San Francisco could pursue a veteran pass rusher through trade as the front office looks to fix one of the NFL’s weakest pressure units from last season.The growing speculation comes shortly after the Los Angeles Rams strengthened their defense by landing Myles Garrett, a move that appears to have shifted urgency inside the NFC West.The 49ers are emerging as one of the most discussed landing spots for Kayvon Thibodeaux if the New York Giants decide to move him before the season. San Francisco’s interest makes sense on multiple levels. The team struggled badly to generate pressure in 2025, finishing near the bottom of the league in both pressure rate and sack production.Even with Nick Bosa expected back healthy, the front office appears unwilling to rely entirely on internal improvement.Injuries exposed the lack of depth on the defensive line last year, especially after rookie Mykel Williams went down early in the season.A player like Thibodeaux could immediately change the rotation. His speed off the edge would complement Bosa while giving defensive coordinator Robert Saleh another reliable pass-rushing option in obvious passing situations.The 49ers are not the only team monitoring the situation. Several playoff contenders are expected to keep tabs on the Giants’ plans, especially if contract negotiations remain stalled.NFL insider Jason La Canfora reported that multiple general managers around the league believe San Francisco is preparing to target an edge rusher before the regular season begins.There is also a growing belief that the Rams’ blockbuster addition of Garrett may have accelerated the 49ers’ thinking. Rival executives reportedly expect San Francisco to respond rather than sit quietly after falling behind in pass-rush production last season.Other names have surfaced as possibilities, including Arizona Cardinals pass rusher Josh Sweat, who has reportedly requested a trade. He is still playing under his rookie contract, making him easier to absorb compared to elite veterans carrying massive cap numbers.That matters for San Francisco. The 49ers already have significant money committed across the roster, particularly after recent extensions on both sides of the ball. Pursuing a superstar-level contract like Maxx Crosby’s would likely require major restructuring.Thibodeaux offers a different kind of gamble. The 49ers still believe their championship window remains open, but last year exposed clear weaknesses along the front seven.A stronger pass rush would ease pressure on the secondary while giving the defense more flexibility in late-game situations.For the Giants, moving Thibodeaux would signal a broader roster reset. If the organization is not prepared to commit long-term money, trading him now could bring back valuable draft assets and help reshape the roster for the future.With training camp approaching, league executives expect conversations around pass rushers to intensify quickly. The 49ers may not wait long before making their move.

While stars like Maxx Crosby seem financially unrealistic, Thibodeaux’s rookie contract makes him a more manageable option. Other names, including Arizona Cardinals pass rusher Josh Sweat, have also surfaced in trade discussions.

Article Title: Aldon Smith cause of death: What happened to former All-Pro linebacker
Article Text:
Aldon Smith Dead at 36 (Getty Images)

What was Aldon Smith's cause of death?



How did Aldon Smith's NFL career unravel after such a promising start?



The NFL lost one of its most electrifying defensive players on Saturday night. The San Francisco 49ers confirmed the death of former outside linebacker Aldon Smith, who was just 36 years old. No cause of death has been released. Smith burst onto the scene in 2011 as one of the most feared pass rushers in the league, racking up 52.5 career sacks across stints with the 49ers, Raiders, and Cowboys. His career, however, never reached the heights many expected.The 49ers broke the news on June 13, 2026, in an official statement that offered grief but no answers. "We are devastated by the sudden and tragic passing of Aldon Smith," the franchise said. "Aldon's undeniable talent and sheer dominance on the field were on display from the moment he joined our organization, having recorded one of the best rookie seasons the National Football League has seen. Beyond his excellence as a player, Aldon will be remembered for his infectious smile that lit up every room he walked into. Our entire organization sends its deepest condolences to the Smith family and all who knew and loved Aldon."At the time of writing, neither Smith's family, representatives, nor the 49ers have disclosed a cause. He was born on September 25, 1989. The word "sudden" in the team's statement stood out. No illness had been publicly known, and nothing in Smith's recent public life signalled this was coming. The NFL world is processing a loss that nobody saw arriving.Smith came into the league as the 7th overall pick in the 2011 NFL Draft, and he immediately looked like a generational talent. As a rookie, he posted 14 sacks, finishing second in Defensive Rookie of the Year voting behind Von Miller. A year later, he was even better. His 2012 season, in which he recorded 19.5 sacks, earned him Pro Bowl and first-team All-Pro honours. At 22, he was being talked about as a cornerstone of the San Francisco defence for the next decade.Then things fell apart. In September 2013, Smith was arrested on suspicion of driving under the influence. He entered a treatment facility and missed five games. The 2014 season brought a nine-game suspension from the NFL for violating substance abuse and personal conduct policies. More legal issues followed, and San Francisco released him in 2015.He signed with the Oakland Raiders and managed nine appearances before another suspension effectively froze his career for several seasons. Smith returned one final time with the Dallas Cowboys in 2020, but that chapter closed quickly. His story is a painful reminder of how quickly professional football can slip away when off-field problems consume what happens on it.
Article Summary: Aldon Smith died on Saturday night at the age of 36. The San Francisco 49ers confirmed the news in a statement. No cause of death has been released. Smith burst onto the scene in 2011 as one of the most feared pass rushers in the league.

What insiders are saying about the trade rumors?

Contract outlook and salary cap implications



How a potential trade could impact both teams

NFL trade rumors surrounding Josh Sweat continue to surface as the Arizona Cardinals move through another crucial phase of their roster planning. While Arizona has publicly shut down speculation about moving the veteran pass rusher, his name remains firmly planted in league conversations.Josh Sweat is currently under a four-year, $76.4 million contract through the 2028 season. However, his offseason absence from voluntary workouts, combined with Arizona's uncertain outlook as a contender, has fueled continued discussion about whether the Cardinals should capitalize on his value.The bigger picture for the Arizona Cardinals is balancing long-term roster building with short-term competitiveness, and Josh Sweat now finds himself at the centre of that conversation.Many strong contenders have emerged in trade rumours, prompting the Arizona Cardinals to eventually reconsider their position. The Chicago Bears stand out as the strongest fit. Despite entering 2026 as defending NFC North champions, Chicago still lacks a dependable edge rusher opposite Montez Sweat.The Chicago Bears managed just 35 sacks last season, exposing a weakness that could hold them back in another playoff run.Josh Sweat would immediately address that issue. His ability to generate pressure consistently would provide Dennis Allen's defense with another proven pass-rushing weapon and create one of the more dangerous edge duos in the NFC.Heavy's Shane Shoemaker highlighted that Josh Sweat remains one of the Cardinals' players most frequently connected to trade talks. The rumors stem from a proposal made by Bleacher Report's Gary Davenport, who outlined several blockbuster scenarios that could impact the playoff race.As Davenport wrote: "Edge-rusher Josh Sweat is another example of a player who has generated all sorts of trade buzz—and a team in the Arizona Cardinals who has said they have no plans to deal him."Even while acknowledging Arizona's public stance, Davenport explained why the Bears make sense. "The Bears, meanwhile, are the defending NFC North champions and a team that badly needs to upgrade the pass rush after logging just 35 sacks last season." He added: "Pairing Josh Sweat and Montez Sweat would accomplish that goal."That combination of team need and long-term planning is what continues to keep Josh Sweat's name alive in NFL trade rumors.Josh Sweat remains under one of the biggest contracts on Arizona's defensive front. He signed a four-year, $76.4 million deal with the Arizona Cardinals that included $38 million in guarantees and an $18.5 million signing bonus.In 2026, he carries a cap hit of approximately $16.39 million while earning $18.1 million in cash. The contract also includes a significant financial obstacle. Arizona would absorb a dead-cap hit of $31.8 million if it moved on from Sweat during the 2026 season.Because of those financial implications, any trade would likely require meaningful draft compensation rather than serving as a simple salary-clearing move.For Arizona, trading Josh Sweat would signal a shift toward future flexibility. It would allow the Cardinals to collect additional draft capital while reshaping the roster around younger pieces. The immediate downside would be substantial. Josh Sweat recorded 12 sacks and 47 quarterback pressures in 2025 and has posted at least 6.5 sacks in each of the last four seasons. For the Chicago Bears, the impact would be immediate. Pairing Josh Sweat with Montez Sweat would transform Chicago's pass rush and reduce pressure on the rest of the defensive front. It would also strengthen a team that already believes it has the pieces to compete deep into January.As of now, Josh Sweat remains an Arizona Cardinal. But NFL trade rumors continue to follow him closely as contenders monitor whether Arizona's stance changes before the 2026 season begins.
Article Summary: Josh Sweat is currently under a four-year, $76.4 million contract with the Arizona Cardinals. The contract includes a cap hit of approximately $16.39 million while earning $18.1 million in cash. Bleacher Report's Gary Davenport names the Chicago Bears as an ideal landing spot for Sweat.

Article Title: Taylor Swift stole the show at Patrick Mahomes' $504M contract signing and it was a toddler who noticed her first
Article Text:
Patrick Mahomes' 3-year-old son spotted Taylor Swift's photo before noticing his own dad at Chiefs signing (Getty Images)

How did Patrick Mahomes' son steal the show at the contract signing?



What does Patrick Mahomes' $504 million extension mean for the Chiefs?



Patrick Mahomes has signed the richest contract in NFL history. The Kansas City Chiefs quarterback agreed to a two-year extension worth $504.75 million, keeping him with the franchise through 2033. First reported by ESPN's Adam Schefter and Ian Rapoport, the deal crossed the half-billion-dollar mark, a first in league history. The signing was made official on Friday, June 12, and the Chiefs shared the moment publicly. What nobody expected, though, was that a three-year-old would steal the show.Mahomes was joined at Arrowhead Stadium by his wife Brittany and their three children, Sterling, Golden, and Patrick "Bronze" Lavon Mahomes III. The Chiefs posted a video of the signing ceremony, and in it, Bronze is spotted walking through the hall when he sees Taylor Swift 's photo on the wall. He lights up immediately. "It's Taylor!" he shouts, before eventually turning toward his father and adding, "It's dada!"The internet, predictably, loved it. Bronze recognised Swift before he recognised the quarterback who just signed the largest contract in football history. The kid has priorities. It also adds a warm, human layer to what was otherwise a landmark business moment for the franchise.Given how intertwined the Chiefs and Taylor Swift have become since she started attending games in 2023, Bronze being a Swiftie is hardly a surprise. Swift and Travis Kelce got engaged in August 2025, and their wedding, expected at Madison Square Garden this summer, is shaping up to be one of the most high-profile events of the year.If Bronze makes the guest list, nobody will be shocked.The Chiefs are calling it a "landmark deal," and general manager Brett Veach did not hold back on what Mahomes means to the organisation. "This is a huge day for the Chiefs, Patrick, and really all of Chiefs Kingdom," Veach said in a statement. He described Mahomes as "one of the most prolific quarterbacks to ever play the game," adding that he "changed the culture of our building and has led us in the most successful era in our franchise's history. "That last part is not hyperbole. Mahomes is 29 years old and has already led Kansas City to five Super Bowl appearances and three championships. By the numbers alone, the deal looks justifiable. Still, the contract comes with a notable asterisk. Mahomes suffered a torn ACL and LCL in December and is currently working his way back. He is expected to be ready for the season, and the Chiefs open on Monday Night Football against the Denver Broncos on September 14.For a franchise betting big on Mahomes through 2033, health is the only real variable. Everything else, his production, his leadership, his standing in the game, is already settled. Kansas City is not paying for potential. They are paying for a quarterback who has already delivered more than most franchises see in a generation.
Article Summary: Patrick Mahomes has signed the richest contract in NFL history. The Kansas City Chiefs quarterback agreed to a two-year extension worth $504.75 million. Mahomes was joined at Arrowhead Stadium by his wife Brittany and their three children, Sterling, Golden, and Patrick "Bronze" Lavon Mahomes III.

Article Title: Who was Aldon Smith? Former San Francisco 49ers defensive star and former All-Pro dies at 36
Article Text:
Who was Aldon Smith? Former San Francisco 49ers defensive star and former All-Pro dies at 36(Getty)

How Aldon Smith became one of the NFL's most feared pass rushers

Tributes pour in for former 49ers star Aldon Smith

Aldon Smith, one of the most dominant pass rushers of his era, has died at the age of 36. The San Francisco 49ers confirmed the news on June 13, 2026. The cause of death was not immediately released.For NFL fans, Smith remains one of football's biggest what-if stories. At his peak, he looked capable of becoming the next great defensive superstar. Instead, a career that began with record-setting production took several difficult turns before ending far sooner than many expected.Long before legal troubles interrupted his career, Aldon Smith terrorized quarterbacks across the league. The former Missouri standout entered the NFL as the seventh overall pick in the 2011 Draft and made an immediate impact for the San Francisco 49ers.As a rookie in 2011, Aldon Smith recorded 14 sacks, the second-most sacks by a rookie in NFL history at the time. He helped San Francisco reach the NFC Championship Game and quickly became one of the league's most exciting young defenders.Then came his breakout season. In 2012, Aldon Smith piled up 19.5 sacks, setting a San Francisco 49ers franchise record. His production alongside veteran defensive lineman Justin Smith powered one of the NFL's most feared defenses.That season ended with the 49ers reaching Super Bowl XLVII.Following news of his death, the 49ers released a statement: "We are devastated by the sudden and tragic passing of Aldon Smith," the organization said while remembering both his on-field dominance and the energy he brought to the team.The numbers from Smith's first two seasons still stand among the best starts to a career by any pass rusher. He totaled 33.5 sacks across those years, an NFL record for a player in his first two seasons at the time.However, his career soon changed course. Multiple arrests and violations of league policies led to suspensions that repeatedly kept him off the field. The 49ers released him in August 2015. He later spent time with the Oakland Raiders and returned to the NFL with the Dallas Cowboys in 2020 after several years away from the game.Even so, fans often remember the player before the setbacks. They remember the explosive edge rusher who could change a game in a single series.Following Aldon Smith's sudden demise, fans poured in their heartfelt tribute to the former All-Pro.A fan wrote, "Rest in peace, Smith.”Another fan wrote, “Fastest player to reach 30 sacks in history. was on track to be as good as Myles Garrett at one point.rip”One more fan added, “Wow! So young. RIP 🙏🏾💔.”Another added, “RIP. Dude was a generational talent and so young.”Aldon Smith's story remains one of immense talent, unrealised potential, and unforgettable moments. His death at 36 closes a chapter that many football fans believed would have looked very different.
Article Summary: Aldon Smith, one of the most dominant pass rushers of his era, has died at the age of 36. The San Francisco 49ers confirmed the news on June 13, 2026. The cause of death was not immediately released. At his peak, he looked capable of becoming the next great defensive superstar.

Article Title: Knicks win in chaos: NYPD rescues Spurs fan fighting hundreds in New York’s celebration
Article Text:
Knicks celebrates Championship. Image via: Ross D. Franklin/AP

NYPD forced to intervene after Spurs fan confronts crowd during Knicks celebration



NYPD rescues Spurs fan. Image via: @diaper_man_official/ Instagram

NYPD reveals extent of chaos and property damage following Knicks' win



Fans cause chaos in New York. Image via: Getty Images

The Knicks win in chaos storyline extended beyond the court Saturday night when New York police officers were forced to escort a San Antonio Spurs fan out of Penn Station after a confrontation with celebrating Knicks supporters during the franchise's first NBA championship celebration since 1973.The incident unfolded shortly after New York sealed a 94-90 victory over San Antonio in Game 5 of the NBA Finals. As thousands of fans flooded streets around Madison Square Garden, video showed an unidentified Spurs supporter in a Dennis Rodman jersey throwing punches while surrounded by a growing crowd at Moynihan Food Hall. The scene quickly became one of several disturbances that drew police attention across the city during a night that mixed celebration with disorder.According to videos circulating online, the altercation began near Penn Station as Knicks fans celebrated the end of a 53-year championship drought. The footage starts with the Spurs fan approaching a New York supporter and taking a swing before a large crowd formed around him.As tensions escalated, the fan continued throwing punches while moving through a circle of onlookers. Several people attempted to strike him from behind, including one person who appeared to try kicking him to the ground.Despite repeated confrontations, the Spurs supporter remained on his feet as police officers arrived to calm the situation.When initial efforts failed, additional NYPD officers responded and began escorting the fan away from the crowd. Video showed him repeatedly attempting to move back toward the gathering while officers redirected him. Police eventually formed a barricade and guided him out of the building to prevent further clashes.Before leaving, the fan could be heard shouting, "Meet me outside" toward those gathered around him. No charges had been publicly announced in connection with the incident, as per Daily Mail.The confrontation came moments after another painful Finals collapse for San Antonio. The Spurs held a 16-point second-half lead before New York stormed back behind Jalen Brunson, who scored 15 fourth-quarter points and finished with 45, delivering the franchise's first title in more than five decades.The Penn Station confrontation was only one part of a turbulent night across New York City.The NYPD reported 63 arrests, 10 injured officers, multiple stabbings and slashings, and a 17-year-old who suffered a gunshot wound to the foot during overnight celebrations. Authorities also reported extensive property damage, including five school buses set on fire and several police vehicles vandalized.Knicks owner James Dolan urged supporters to celebrate responsibly from the championship stage in Texas, saying, "We're going to have a parade on Thursday. But everybody tonight in New York, be safe. Celebrate but be safe."With a championship parade still ahead, city officials now face the challenge of managing another massive gathering while preventing a repeat of the scenes that overshadowed one of the biggest nights in Knicks history.
Article Summary: NYPD forced to intervene after Spurs fan confronts crowd during Knicks celebration. NYPD reported 63 arrests, 10 injured officers, multiple stabbings and slashings. Authorities also reported extensive property damage, including five school buses set on fire and several police vehicles vandalized.
